revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月十四]][[zh:八月十四]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 14|qq=August 14}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|qid=Q1194415|lt=Bunchi|1=Bunji (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|qid=Q19729|lt=1185|1=1185}} {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}}) – {{ill|Genryaku|en|Genryaku|qid=Q1194250|lt=Genryaku|1=Genryaku}} より {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|qid=Q1194415|lt=Bunchi|1=Bunji (era)}} に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Kan'en|en|Kan'en|qid=Q1145723|lt=Kannen|1=Kan'en}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1748|en|1748|qid=Q7600|lt=1748|1=1748}} {{ill|September 6|en|September 6|qid=Q2858|lt=September 6|1=September 6}}) – In Osaka at Takemoto-za, the puppet joruri drama {{ill|Ningyō Joruri|ja|人形浄瑠璃|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ningyō Joruri|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 文楽|1=Bunraku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q243170}} ′{{ill|Kanadehon Chūshingura|en|Kanadehon Chūshingura|qid=Q2706664|lt=Kaden-tehon Chūshingura|1=Kanadehon Chūshingura}}′ was first performed. * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|September 14|en|September 14|qid=Q2847|lt=September 14|1=September 14}}) – In the {{ill|Shimonoseki campaign|en|Shimonoseki campaign|qid=Q891773|lt=Shimonoseki War|1=Shimonoseki campaign}}, the {{ill|Chōshū Domain|en|Chōshū Domain|qid=Q876267|lt=Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain}} made peace ({{ill|Treaty|ja|講和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 平和条約|1=Peace treaty|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q625298}}) with the combined fleet of England, America, Italy, France, and Shikoku. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|September 28|en|September 28|qid=Q2883|lt=September 28|1=September 28}}) – The {{ill|Ministry of Industry (Japan)|en|Ministry of Industry (Japan)|qid=Q14619270|lt=Ministry of Industry|1=Ministry of Industry (Japan)}} established a {{ill|Railway Office|ja|Railway寮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Office|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Births == * {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|qid=Q1192766|lt=Meireki|1=Meireki}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1656|en|1656|qid=Q6982|lt=1656|1=1656}} {{ill|October 1|en|October 1|qid=Q2913|lt=October 1|1=October 1}}) – {{ill|Morikawa Koroku|ja|森川許六|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Morikawa Koroku|1=Morikawa Kyoriku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11539642}}, one of the retainers of {{ill|Shōmon Jūtetsu|ja|正門重徹|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmon Jūtetsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (died {{ill|1715|en|1715|qid=Q6884|lt=1715|1=1715}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenryaku|en|Tenryaku|qid=Q1346281|lt=Tenryaku|1=Tenryaku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|949|en|949|qid=Q24352|lt=949|1=949}} 9月9日) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Tadahira|en|Fujiwara no Tadahira|qid=Q1397601|lt=Fujiwara Tadahei|1=Fujiwara no Tadahira}}, a member of the {{ill|Kugyō|en|Kugyō|qid=Q3138036|lt=Kugyō|1=Kugyō}} (born {{ill|880|en|880|qid=Q23618|lt=880|1=880}}). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1511|en|1511|qid=Q6188|lt=1511|1=1511}} {{ill|September 6|en|September 6|qid=Q2858|lt=September 6|1=September 6}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshizumi|en|Ashikaga Yoshizumi|qid=Q466281|lt=Ashikaga Yoshizumi|1=Ashikaga Yoshizumi}}, the 11th-generation {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|ja|足利幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 室町幕府|1=Ashikaga shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} (born {{ill|1481|en|1481|qid=Q6631|lt=1481|1=1481}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1612|en|1612|qid=Q6771|lt=1612|1=1612}} {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}}) – {{ill|Nakagawa Hidenari|en|Nakagawa Hidenari|qid=Q11364924|lt=Nakagawa Hidenari|1=Nakagawa Hidenari}}, the first lord of the {{ill|Oka Domain|en|Oka Domain|qid=Q8192275|lt=Oka Domain|1=Oka Domain}} (born {{ill|1570|en|1570|qid=Q6659|lt=1570|1=1570}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1729|en|1729|qid=Q6952|lt=1729|1=1729}} {{ill|September 6|en|September 6|qid=Q2858|lt=September 6|1=September 6}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Mototomo|ja|松平基知|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Mototomo|1=Matsudaira Motochika|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11239147}}, the 2nd lord of the {{ill|Shirakawa Domain|en|Shirakawa Domain|qid=Q1067555|lt=Shirakawa Domain|1=Shirakawa Domain}} (born {{ill|1679|en|1679|qid=Q7638|lt=1679|1=1679}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunka|1=Bunsei}} 13rd year, leap 8th month 14th day ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1816|en|1816|qid=Q6953|lt=1816|1=1816}} {{ill|October 5|en|October 5|qid=Q2930|lt=October 5|1=October 5}}) – {{ill|Shiohara Tadasuke|ja|塩原太助|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiohara Tadasuke|1=Tasuke Shiobara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11428625}}, a wealthy merchant of the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|qid=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}} (born {{ill|1743|en|1743|qid=Q7580|lt=1743|1=1743}}). == Commemorations == * 待宵（まつよい：{{ill|Mid-Autumn Festival|ja|中秋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mid-Autumn Festival|qq=}} の前夜） == Fictional Events == === Deaths === * 年不明 – {{ill|Murasaki no Ue|en|Murasaki no Ue|qid=Q1028559|lt=Murasaki no Ue|1=Murasaki no Ue}}, a character from {{ill|The Tale of Genji|en|The Tale of Genji|qid=Q8269|lt=The Tale of Genji|1=The Tale of Genji}}.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|13|8|15|7|14|9|8|0814|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 8월 14일]] [[ja:8月14日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:八月十四]]
[[ar:August 14 (Lunisolar)]]
